name: Roadmap
description: A simple, robust project roadmapping tool — one roadmap per placement. Set a project name, overview, and quick links; break the work into milestones with target dates; and track dozens of small tasks per milestone through three states (unstarted, in-progress, complete), claiming and checking them off as you go. Drag tasks between milestones (or the Back Burner / Maybe Later buckets) to reprioritize, and within a milestone to rank them. Collapsed milestone headers still show live counts and a completed-per-day burn rate; a Timeline view lays out upcoming milestones with days-remaining and overdue color-coding. A milestone can only be marked done once all its tasks are complete. Everything is stored in a lightweight per-placement encrypted LocalTable database on the host and pushed live to every viewer; non-members get a read-only view.
